violations.text: The 3-bay sink in the kitchen was observed to be in poor repair (dividers not properly sealed). Equipment must be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of pink and white residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
